description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house set on a rectangular green lawn with a paved driveway leading to a prominent front entrance. The house features a complex, multi-hipped dark roof with several gables and dormers, and its exterior walls are a light, neutral color, likely stone or stucco. The front facade is symmetrical, with a central arched entryway flanked by large windows and a garage on one side. Several mature trees are distributed around the property, enhancing the landscaped appearance. The rear of the house includes additional windows and architectural detailing, while the sides show garage access and secondary entrances. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional and modern suburban architectural elements, with a focus on curb appeal and spaciousness.
description: A large, two-story suburban house with a multi-hipped dark roof, light exterior walls, and a prominent arched entryway, set on a landscaped lawn with a paved driveway and surrounding trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main arched entryway, symmetrical windows, garage, and the full driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage entrance, side windows, and the depth of the house, with trees framing the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional windows, architectural details, and the backyard area with trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing secondary entrances, more windows, and the continuation of the driveway around the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Central arched entryway with steps, flanked by columns and large windows, covered by a small overhang.
